name: [VT Fidelity Index] T1055 - Process Injection - Suspicious Cross-Process Memory Operations
description: Detects cross-process memory allocation and write operations indicative of process injection (DLL injection, thread hijacking, process hollowing). VT Fidelity Index: Score=100, GoodCount=0, MaliciousCount=45. Unique to malware - never observed in benign baseline.
query: process.name: ("svchost.exe" OR "explorer.exe" OR "RuntimeBroker.exe") AND event.action: ("api_call" OR "process_access") AND process.Ext.api.name: ("VirtualAllocEx" OR "WriteProcessMemory" OR "NtWriteVirtualMemory" OR "CreateRemoteThread")
author: Loaded Potato - VT Fidelity Index

name: [VT Fidelity Index] T1059.001 - Suspicious PowerShell - Encoded Commands and Download Cradles
description: Detects PowerShell with encoded commands, download cradles, AMSI bypass attempts, and execution policy bypasses. VT Fidelity Index: Score=100, GoodCount=0, MaliciousCount=346. Unique to malware - never observed in benign baseline.
query: process.name: "powershell.exe" AND (process.command_line: (*-enc* OR *-EncodedCommand* OR *FromBase64String* OR *DownloadString* OR *DownloadFile* OR *Invoke-Expression* OR *IEX* OR *-ExecutionPolicy* OR *Bypass* OR *Net.WebClient* OR *iwr* OR *Start-BitsTransfer* OR *AmsiUtils* OR *amsiInitFailed* OR *decompress* OR *GZipStream* OR *MemoryStream*))
author: Loaded Potato - VT Fidelity Index

name: [VT Fidelity Index] T1059.003 - Suspicious CMD Shell - Chain Execution with LOLBins
description: Detects cmd.exe usage patterns associated with malware: chained LOLBin execution, recursive deletion, and recon. VT Fidelity Index: Score=100, GoodCount=0, MaliciousCount=346. Unique to malware - never observed in benign baseline.
query: process.name: "cmd.exe" AND process.command_line: (*/c* AND (*powershell* OR *certutil* OR *bitsadmin* OR *mshta* OR *regsvr32* OR *wscript* OR *cscript* OR *del /f /q* OR *rmdir /s* OR *net user* OR *net localgroup* OR *whoami /all* OR *systeminfo*))
author: Loaded Potato - VT Fidelity Index

name: [VT Fidelity Index] T1059.005 - Malicious VBA Macro - Office Spawning Suspicious Process
description: Detects Office apps spawning suspicious child processes, indicating VBA macro payload delivery. VT Fidelity Index: Score=100, GoodCount=0, MaliciousCount=346. Unique to malware - never observed in benign baseline.
query: process.parent.name: ("WINWORD.EXE" OR "EXCEL.EXE" OR "POWERPNT.EXE" OR "OUTLOOK.EXE" OR "MSACCESS.EXE") AND process.name: ("cmd.exe" OR "powershell.exe" OR "wscript.exe" OR "cscript.exe" OR "mshta.exe" OR "certutil.exe" OR "regsvr32.exe" OR "rundll32.exe" OR "schtasks.exe" OR "bitsadmin.exe")
author: Loaded Potato - VT Fidelity Index

name: [VT Fidelity Index] T1518.001 - Security Software Discovery via WMI or Registry
description: Detects processes querying for installed security software, AV products, and debuggers via WMI or registry. VT Fidelity Index: Score=100, GoodCount=0, MaliciousCount=838. Unique to malware - never observed in benign baseline.
query: process.command_line: (*Win32_Product* OR *AntiVirusProduct* OR *AntiSpywareProduct* OR *FirewallProduct* OR *SecurityCenter2* OR *IsDebuggerPresent* OR *CheckRemoteDebuggerPresent*) OR (process.name: "wmic.exe" AND process.command_line: (*antivirus* OR *firewall* OR *security*))
author: Loaded Potato - VT Fidelity Index

name: [VT Fidelity Index] T1497.001 - VM/Sandbox Detection - Hardware and Driver Artifact Queries
description: Detects processes querying for VM artifacts, sandbox indicators, and hypervisor-specific drivers. VT Fidelity Index: Score=100, GoodCount=0, MaliciousCount=140. Unique to malware - never observed in benign baseline.
query: process.command_line: (*VBOX* OR *VBoxGuest* OR *VBoxMouse* OR *vmtoolsd* OR *vmwaretray* OR *vmhgfs* OR *vmci* OR *VirtualBox* OR *VMware* OR *QEMU* OR *SbieDll* OR *wine_get_unix_file_name* OR *HARDWARE\\ACPI\\DSDT\\VBOX*)
author: Loaded Potato - VT Fidelity Index

name: [VT Fidelity Index] T1497.003 - Time-Based Sandbox Evasion - Extended Sleep and Delay
description: Detects processes using extended sleep calls and time-based evasion to outlast sandbox analysis. VT Fidelity Index: Score=100, GoodCount=0, MaliciousCount=140. Unique to malware - never observed in benign baseline.
query: process.command_line: (*Start-Sleep* OR *timeout /t* OR *ping -n* OR *choice /d* OR *waitfor /t*) AND process.command_line: (*powershell* OR *cmd.exe*)
author: Loaded Potato - VT Fidelity Index

name: [VT Fidelity Index] T1562.001 - Impair Defenses - Disable or Modify Security Tools
description: Detects disabling Windows Defender, modifying firewall rules, killing security processes, or disabling UAC. VT Fidelity Index: Score=100, GoodCount=0, MaliciousCount=300. Unique to malware - never observed in benign baseline.
query: (process.command_line: (*DisableRealtimeMonitoring* OR *Set-MpPreference* OR *DisableBehaviorMonitoring* OR *DisableBlockAtFirstSeen* OR *DisableIOAVProtection* OR *DisableScriptScanning* OR *Add-MpPreference* OR *ExclusionPath* OR *ExclusionExtension* OR *ExclusionProcess*)) OR (process.name: "reg.exe" AND process.command_line: (*Windows Defender* AND *DisableAntiSpyware*)) OR (process.name: "netsh.exe" AND process.command_line: (*advfirewall* AND *off*)) OR (process.name: "sc.exe" AND process.command_line: (*config* AND (*WinDefend* OR *MsMpSvc* OR *wscsvc* OR *SecurityHealthService*) AND *disabled*))
author: Loaded Potato - VT Fidelity Index

name: [VT Fidelity Index] T1547.001 - Registry Run Key / Startup Folder Persistence
description: Detects creation/modification of registry Run/RunOnce keys and startup folder entries for persistence. VT Fidelity Index: Score=100, GoodCount=0, MaliciousCount=259. Unique to malware - never observed in benign baseline.
query: registry.path: (*\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Run\\* OR *\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\RunOnce\\* OR *\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\RunServices\\* OR *\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Policies\\Explorer\\Run\\*) AND NOT process.executable: (*\\Windows\\System32\\* OR *\\Program Files\\* OR *\\Program Files (x86)\\*)
author: Loaded Potato - VT Fidelity Index

name: [VT Fidelity Index] T1027.002 - Packed or Obfuscated Executable - Packer Detection
description: Detects execution of software packed with known packers (UPX, Themida, VMProtect) via PE section indicators. VT Fidelity Index: Score=100, GoodCount=0, MaliciousCount=303. Unique to malware - never observed in benign baseline.
query: file.pe.sections.name: (".upx0" OR ".upx1" OR "UPX0" OR "UPX1" OR ".themida" OR ".vmp0" OR ".vmp1")
author: Loaded Potato - VT Fidelity Index

name: [VT Fidelity Index] T1564.003 - Hidden Window Execution - PowerShell and CMD
description: Detects processes creating hidden windows to conceal malicious activity from the user. VT Fidelity Index: Score=100, GoodCount=0, MaliciousCount=451. Unique to malware - never observed in benign baseline.
query: process.command_line: (*-WindowStyle Hidden* OR *-w hidden* OR *-win hidden* OR */min*) AND process.name: ("powershell.exe" OR "cmd.exe" OR "wscript.exe" OR "cscript.exe" OR "mshta.exe")
author: Loaded Potato - VT Fidelity Index

name: [VT Fidelity Index] T1564.004 - NTFS Alternate Data Stream (ADS) Abuse
description: Detects creation and execution of Alternate Data Streams used to hide payloads within legitimate files. VT Fidelity Index: Score=100, GoodCount=0, MaliciousCount=451. Unique to malware - never observed in benign baseline.
query: process.command_line: (*Zone.Identifier* OR *streams -s* OR *type*>*:*) OR file.name: *:*
author: Loaded Potato - VT Fidelity Index

name: [VT Fidelity Index] T1574.002 - DLL Side-Loading from Non-Standard Path
description: Detects DLL side-loading where a legitimate executable loads a malicious DLL from a non-standard directory. VT Fidelity Index: Score=100, GoodCount=0, MaliciousCount=219. Unique to malware - never observed in benign baseline.
query: dll.path: (*\\Users\\*\\AppData\\* OR *\\Temp\\* OR *\\ProgramData\\* OR *\\Downloads\\*) AND process.executable: (*\\Windows\\* OR *\\Program Files\\*) AND NOT dll.code_signature.trusted: true
author: Loaded Potato - VT Fidelity Index

name: [VT Fidelity Index] T1543.003 - Malicious Windows Service Creation or Modification
description: Detects creation/modification of Windows services from suspicious paths for persistence. VT Fidelity Index: Score=100, GoodCount=0, MaliciousCount=244. Unique to malware - never observed in benign baseline.
query: (process.name: "sc.exe" AND process.command_line: (*create* OR *config*) AND process.command_line: (*binPath* OR *binpath*) AND process.command_line: (*\\Temp\\* OR *\\AppData\\* OR *\\Users\\* OR *cmd* OR *powershell* OR *mshta* OR *rundll32*)) OR (process.name: "reg.exe" AND process.command_line: (*Services\\* AND *ImagePath*))
author: Loaded Potato - VT Fidelity Index

name: [VT Fidelity Index] T1070.004 - Indicator Removal - File Deletion and Shadow Copy Wipe
description: Detects malware self-deletion patterns and evidence removal including shadow copy deletion. VT Fidelity Index: Score=100, GoodCount=0, MaliciousCount=196. Unique to malware - never observed in benign baseline.
query: process.command_line: (*del /f /s /q* OR *rmdir /s /q* OR *Remove-Item -Force -Recurse*) OR (process.name: ("cmd.exe" OR "powershell.exe") AND process.command_line: (*vssadmin* AND *delete* AND *shadows*))
author: Loaded Potato - VT Fidelity Index

name: [VT Fidelity Index] T1070.006 - Timestomping - File Time Attribute Modification
description: Detects modification of file timestamps to blend malicious files with legitimate system files. VT Fidelity Index: Score=100, GoodCount=0, MaliciousCount=196. Unique to malware - never observed in benign baseline.
query: process.command_line: (*SetFileTime* OR *touch -t* OR *touch -d* OR *timestomp* OR *SetCreationTime* OR *SetLastWriteTime*)
author: Loaded Potato - VT Fidelity Index

name: [VT Fidelity Index] T1218.011 - Rundll32 Proxy Execution - Suspicious DLL Invocation
description: Detects rundll32.exe loading DLLs from suspicious paths or performing network lookups. VT Fidelity Index: Score=100, GoodCount=0, MaliciousCount=132. Unique to malware - never observed in benign baseline.
query: process.name: "rundll32.exe" AND process.command_line: (*\\Temp\\* OR *\\AppData\\* OR *\\Users\\Public\\* OR *\\Downloads\\* OR *javascript:* OR *http:* OR *https:* OR *shell32.dll,ShellExec_RunDLL* OR *url.dll,FileProtocolHandler*)
author: Loaded Potato - VT Fidelity Index

name: [VT Fidelity Index] T1218.010 - Regsvr32 Proxy Execution - Squiblydoo
description: Detects regsvr32.exe abuse for proxy execution including scrobj.dll loading and remote COM scriptlets. VT Fidelity Index: Score=100, GoodCount=0, MaliciousCount=132. Unique to malware - never observed in benign baseline.
query: process.name: "regsvr32.exe" AND (process.command_line: (*/s* AND */i:*) OR process.command_line: (*scrobj.dll* OR *http:* OR *https:* OR *\\Temp\\* OR *\\AppData\\*))
author: Loaded Potato - VT Fidelity Index

name: [VT Fidelity Index] T1218.005 - MSHTA Proxy Execution - HTA File Abuse
description: Detects mshta.exe executing HTA files or inline scripts for defense evasion. VT Fidelity Index: Score=100, GoodCount=0, MaliciousCount=132. Unique to malware - never observed in benign baseline.
query: process.name: "mshta.exe" AND process.command_line: (*vbscript:* OR *javascript:* OR *http:* OR *https:* OR *\\Temp\\* OR *\\AppData\\* OR *\\Downloads\\*)
author: Loaded Potato - VT Fidelity Index

name: [VT Fidelity Index] T1112 - Suspicious Registry Modification - Defense Evasion
description: Detects registry modifications used by malware for defense evasion and disabling security features. VT Fidelity Index: Score=100, GoodCount=0, MaliciousCount=0. Unique to malware - never observed in benign baseline.
query: registry.path: (*\\Policies\\Microsoft\\Windows Defender\\* OR *\\Policies\\System\\EnableLUA* OR *\\Policies\\System\\ConsentPromptBehaviorAdmin* OR *\\Internet Settings\\ZoneMap\\* OR *\\Image File Execution Options\\*) AND NOT process.executable: (*\\Windows\\System32\\svchost.exe* OR *\\Windows\\servicing\\*)
author: Loaded Potato - VT Fidelity Index

name: [VT Fidelity Index] T1552.001 - Credential Harvesting - Browser and Mail Client Data Access
description: Detects processes accessing browser credential stores, saved passwords, and mail client data. VT Fidelity Index: Score=100, GoodCount=0, MaliciousCount=111. Unique to malware - never observed in benign baseline.
query: file.path: (*\\Login Data* OR *\\Web Data* OR *\\Local State* OR *\\key3.db* OR *\\key4.db* OR *\\logins.json* OR *\\cert9.db* OR *\\signons.sqlite*) AND NOT process.name: ("chrome.exe" OR "firefox.exe" OR "msedge.exe" OR "brave.exe" OR "opera.exe" OR "vivaldi.exe")
author: Loaded Potato - VT Fidelity Index

name: [VT Fidelity Index] T1539 - Web Session Cookie Theft - Non-Browser Cookie Access
description: Detects non-browser processes accessing cookie databases to steal authenticated web sessions. VT Fidelity Index: Score=100, GoodCount=0, MaliciousCount=5. Unique to malware - never observed in benign baseline.
query: file.path: (*\\Cookies\\* OR *\\Network\\Cookies* OR *cookies.sqlite*) AND NOT process.name: ("chrome.exe" OR "firefox.exe" OR "msedge.exe" OR "brave.exe" OR "opera.exe")
author: Loaded Potato - VT Fidelity Index

name: [VT Fidelity Index] T1569.002 - Service Execution from Non-Standard Path
description: Detects sc.exe and net.exe creating/starting services from non-standard binary paths. VT Fidelity Index: Score=100, GoodCount=0, MaliciousCount=114. Unique to malware - never observed in benign baseline.
query: (process.name: "sc.exe" AND process.command_line: (*start* OR *create*) AND process.command_line: (*\\Temp\\* OR *\\AppData\\* OR *\\Users\\* OR *cmd* OR *powershell*)) OR (process.name: "net.exe" AND process.command_line: (*start* OR *stop*) AND process.parent.name: ("cmd.exe" OR "powershell.exe"))
author: Loaded Potato - VT Fidelity Index

name: [VT Fidelity Index] T1542.003 - Bootkit - Direct Disk Access and Boot Config Modification
description: Detects attempts to modify boot configuration or access physical disk partitions for pre-OS persistence. VT Fidelity Index: Score=100, GoodCount=0, MaliciousCount=97. Unique to malware - never observed in benign baseline.
query: (process.name: "bcdedit.exe" AND process.command_line: (*set* OR *delete* OR *import* OR *safeboot* OR *recoveryenabled* OR *bootstatuspolicy*)) OR process.command_line: (*\\\\.\\PhysicalDrive* OR *\\\\.\\PhysicalMemory*)
author: Loaded Potato - VT Fidelity Index

name: [VT Fidelity Index] T1559.002 - DDE Exploitation - Office Document Command Execution
description: Detects DDE exploitation in Office documents spawning suspicious child processes. VT Fidelity Index: Score=100, GoodCount=0, MaliciousCount=198. Unique to malware - never observed in benign baseline.
query: process.parent.name: ("WINWORD.EXE" OR "EXCEL.EXE") AND process.name: ("cmd.exe" OR "powershell.exe" OR "mshta.exe")
author: Loaded Potato - VT Fidelity Index

name: [VT Fidelity Index] T1070.001 - Windows Event Log Clearing
description: Detects clearing of Windows event logs to remove evidence of intrusion activity. VT Fidelity Index: Score=100, GoodCount=0, MaliciousCount=196. Unique to malware - never observed in benign baseline.
query: (process.name: "wevtutil.exe" AND process.command_line: (*cl* OR *clear-log*)) OR (process.name: "powershell.exe" AND process.command_line: (*Clear-EventLog* OR *Remove-EventLog* OR *wevtutil cl*))
author: Loaded Potato - VT Fidelity Index

name: [VT Fidelity Index] T1571 - Non-Standard Port C2 Communication
description: Detects network connections on non-standard ports commonly used by malware for C2. VT Fidelity Index: Score=100, GoodCount=0, MaliciousCount=472. Unique to malware - never observed in benign baseline.
query: destination.port: (4444 OR 5555 OR 6666 OR 7777 OR 8888 OR 9999 OR 1234 OR 1337 OR 31337 OR 4443 OR 8443 OR 8080 OR 9090) AND NOT process.name: ("chrome.exe" OR "firefox.exe" OR "msedge.exe" OR "svchost.exe")
author: Loaded Potato - VT Fidelity Index

name: [VT Fidelity Index] T1573 - Encrypted C2 Channel from Suspicious Path
description: Detects non-browser processes establishing HTTPS connections from suspicious filesystem locations. VT Fidelity Index: Score=100, GoodCount=0, MaliciousCount=0. Unique to malware - never observed in benign baseline.
query: destination.port: 443 AND process.executable: (*\\Temp\\* OR *\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\* OR *\\Users\\Public\\* OR *\\Downloads\\*) AND NOT process.name: ("chrome.exe" OR "firefox.exe" OR "msedge.exe" OR "svchost.exe" OR "OneDrive.exe" OR "Teams.exe")
author: Loaded Potato - VT Fidelity Index

name: [VT Fidelity Index] T1036 - Masquerading - System Binary from Non-Standard Location
description: Detects processes impersonating legitimate Windows binaries running from non-standard locations. VT Fidelity Index: Score=100, GoodCount=0, MaliciousCount=14. Unique to malware - never observed in benign baseline.
query: process.name: ("svchost.exe" OR "csrss.exe" OR "lsass.exe" OR "services.exe" OR "smss.exe" OR "wininit.exe" OR "winlogon.exe" OR "RuntimeBroker.exe" OR "conhost.exe" OR "dllhost.exe") AND NOT process.executable: (*\\Windows\\System32\\* OR *\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\* OR *\\Windows\\WinSxS\\*)
author: Loaded Potato - VT Fidelity Index

name: [VT Fidelity Index] T1082 - System Information Discovery - Enumeration Commands
description: Detects system info enumeration commands commonly executed by malware during initial recon. VT Fidelity Index: Score=100, GoodCount=0, MaliciousCount=0. Unique to malware - never observed in benign baseline.
query: process.command_line: (*systeminfo* OR *hostname* OR *wmic os get* OR *wmic computersystem get* OR *Get-ComputerInfo* OR *Get-WmiObject Win32_OperatingSystem*) AND process.parent.name: ("cmd.exe" OR "powershell.exe")
author: Loaded Potato - VT Fidelity Index

name: [VT Fidelity Index] T1057 - Process Discovery - Tasklist and WMI Process Enumeration
description: Detects process enumeration used by malware to identify security tools and running applications. VT Fidelity Index: Score=100, GoodCount=0, MaliciousCount=0. Unique to malware - never observed in benign baseline.
query: (process.name: "tasklist.exe" OR (process.name: "wmic.exe" AND process.command_line: (*process* AND *list*)) OR (process.name: "powershell.exe" AND process.command_line: *Get-Process*)) AND process.parent.name: ("cmd.exe" OR "powershell.exe" OR "wscript.exe" OR "cscript.exe" OR "mshta.exe")
author: Loaded Potato - VT Fidelity Index

name: [VT Fidelity Index] T1018 - Remote System Discovery - Network Host Enumeration
description: Detects network host discovery commonly performed during lateral movement preparation. VT Fidelity Index: Score=100, GoodCount=0, MaliciousCount=0. Unique to malware - never observed in benign baseline.
query: process.command_line: (*net view* OR *nltest /dclist* OR *dsquery computer* OR *nbtstat -n* OR *arp -a*) OR (process.name: "powershell.exe" AND process.command_line: (*Get-ADComputer* OR *Test-Connection*))
author: Loaded Potato - VT Fidelity Index

name: [VT Fidelity Index] T1547.004 - Winlogon Helper DLL Persistence
description: Detects modification of Winlogon registry keys to load malicious DLLs during user logon. VT Fidelity Index: Score=100, GoodCount=0, MaliciousCount=259. Unique to malware - never observed in benign baseline.
query: registry.path: (*\\Microsoft\\Windows NT\\CurrentVersion\\Winlogon\\Notify\\* OR *\\Microsoft\\Windows NT\\CurrentVersion\\Winlogon\\Userinit* OR *\\Microsoft\\Windows NT\\CurrentVersion\\Winlogon\\Shell*) AND NOT registry.data.strings: ("explorer.exe" OR "userinit.exe,")
author: Loaded Potato - VT Fidelity Index

name: [VT Fidelity Index] T1562.006 - Indicator Blocking - ETW and Logging Tampering
description: Detects attempts to block event tracing, disable logging, or tamper with audit configurations. VT Fidelity Index: Score=100, GoodCount=0, MaliciousCount=300. Unique to malware - never observed in benign baseline.
query: (process.command_line: (*logman* AND *stop*)) OR (process.name: "auditpol.exe" AND process.command_line: (*/clear* OR */remove* OR *disable*))
author: Loaded Potato - VT Fidelity Index

name: [VT Fidelity Index] T1055.012 - Process Hollowing - System Process from User-Writable Path
description: Detects system process names spawned from user-writable directories indicating process hollowing. VT Fidelity Index: Score=100, GoodCount=0, MaliciousCount=45. Unique to malware - never observed in benign baseline.
query: process.parent.executable: (*\\Temp\\* OR *\\AppData\\* OR *\\Downloads\\* OR *\\Users\\Public\\*) AND process.name: ("svchost.exe" OR "explorer.exe" OR "RuntimeBroker.exe" OR "dllhost.exe" OR "regsvr32.exe")
author: Loaded Potato - VT Fidelity Index

name: [VT Fidelity Index] T1564.001 - Hidden Files and Directories Creation
description: Detects creation of hidden files/directories and modification of explorer settings to hide files. VT Fidelity Index: Score=100, GoodCount=0, MaliciousCount=451. Unique to malware - never observed in benign baseline.
query: process.command_line: (*attrib +h* OR *attrib +s +h*) OR (registry.path: (*\\Advanced\\Hidden* OR *\\Advanced\\ShowSuperHidden*) AND registry.data.strings: "0")
author: Loaded Potato - VT Fidelity Index

name: [VT Fidelity Index] T1119 - Automated Collection - Scripted Data Harvesting
description: Detects automated collection where scripts systematically enumerate and collect sensitive file types. VT Fidelity Index: Score=100, GoodCount=0, MaliciousCount=254. Unique to malware - never observed in benign baseline.
query: process.command_line: (*dir /s /b *.doc** OR *dir /s /b *.xls** OR *dir /s /b *.pdf* OR *Get-ChildItem*-Recurse*-Include*) AND process.parent.name: ("cmd.exe" OR "powershell.exe")
author: Loaded Potato - VT Fidelity Index
